name: Brian and Maggie
overview: A dramatization of the story behind and occasion of Thatcher’s last TV interview, the hugely damaging ITV grilling by her old friend Brian Walden, which some view as the final nail in her prime ministerial coffin.

trailers.title: Steve Coogan, Harriet Walter, Stephen Frears and the makers of Brian and Maggie | BFI Q&A
Exclusive Brian and Maggie Interview with Harriet Walter and Steve Coogan
